title: Create canonical link/SCHC wire-format v2 vectors
description: Create independent shared vectors for wire-format v2: signed link frames set I=S and carry short SenderID or 0xffff+IID; announce carries persistent origin epoch; SCHC v2 uses native 0200::/8 residues and explicit RPL source IDs; multicast IDs are immutable. Retain legacy v1 fixtures as explicitly versioned migration data. Implementation remains in project-LICHEN-fmu3, project-LICHEN-p8i6, and project-LICHEN-zp0h.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical vectors cover normal and malformed SenderID/I/S forms, hop re-signing inputs, announce epoch replay, native SCHC, RPL source reconstruction, collisions, and multicast IDs; vector oracles are independent; schemas validate; three independent reviews pass.
